## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership weekly check-in to discuss hiring priorities, growth plans, and operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to scale hiring, with a focus on recruiters as the top priority](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Consolidating some roles (e.g., SEO strategist + programmatic SEO) to streamline hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Projected growth from $2.9M to potentially $15-22M, requiring rapid team expansion](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Need to improve processes and automation for programmatic content production at scale](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Scaling Challenges

  - [Projected growth from $2.9M to potentially $15-22M in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Team expected to grow from 25 to possibly 250 people in two years](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Anticipate major changes every 2-3 months as the company rapidly scales](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Need to set expectations for team about the fast-paced growth and potential challenges](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Hiring Priorities and Recruitment Strategy

  - [Recruiters identified as the top hiring priority to manage the volume of roles](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Considering 2-3 recruiters: 1-2 for client/GNA roles, 1 for technical/engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Exploring options for sourcing tools (e.g., Nune AI) and leveraging personal networks for recruiter referrals](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Discussing the potential use of contract recruiters for immediate needs](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)

### Role Consolidation and Job Descriptions

  - [Merging some roles to streamline hiring process and management:](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
      - [SEO strategist + programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
      - [Content writer + copy editor](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Creating a "production assistant" role to handle end-of-process tasks like CMS publishing and quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=2385.0)
  - [Developing a hybrid role for research and editorial tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Need to improve processes for programmatic content production at scale](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Current model of individual article assignments not sustainable for high-volume clients](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Exploring automation and integration with CMS systems to streamline workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

### Team Updates and Personal Check-ins

  - [Team members shared personal (5-8/10) and work (5-11/10) status updates](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Common themes of excitement about growth opportunities mixed with stress from rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prioritize hiring recruiters, with team members to share referrals and potential candidates](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Daniel to finalize candidates already in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Marcel to create a LinkedIn post about company growth and upcoming announcements](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Explore LinkedIn ads for recruitment, with Kyle to review ad strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=3675.0)
  - [Bridget to set up Nune AI for sourcing candidates](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
  - [Team to allocate time for sourcing efforts in the short term](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)
  - [Kyle to focus on existing client accounts and onboarding new team members](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Marcel and Bridget to discuss focus areas (legal, accounting, contracts) in a separate call](https://fathom.video/share/ZDoLU-aGTGER6_heKsKoAPB5XXbdwceg?tab=summary&timestamp=3695.0)
